name: Zucchini Parmesan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, zucchini, sugar, cheese, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl.
2. Set aside the mixture.
3. Melt butter and stir into buttermilk until combined.
4. Beat eggs in a medium bowl, then add the butter/buttermilk mixture and onion.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the flour mixture to form a thick batter.
6. Grease and flour a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
